Spanish language strings, font metadata, and translation for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[lang_map.json](lang_map.json.md)**: Defines language strings and font metadata for the Spanish (es_ES) locale in the Pebble firmware.
- **[tintin.po](tintin.po.md)**: Spanish translation file for Pebble firmware, including various user interface messages and prompts.
